examples: We are generally very conscientious about our work.
The CCTV reporters are very conscientious.
She is very conscientious and never skimps her work.
There were some conscientious objectors who suggested that the job should be turned down on principle.
"Merck has been proactive and conscientious in evaluating the cardiovascular profile of rofecoxib (Vioxx), " they write.
